scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.start:prod: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:4173 npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run preview --prefix frontend"
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start:prod
